title: Paper Field Editorial
subtitle: A publication system for material research essays.
description: A modular editorial direction for essays, field photographs, and material studies collected over a two-year research program.

blocks.text: The book needed enough structure to hold dense research but enough openness to let images and annotations breathe. The final system uses restrained typography, alternating margins, and chapter-level image rules.

blocks.alt: Paper Field editorial spread with photographs and annotation columns
blocks.caption: Spread system for long-form research and image captions.

left.text: A narrow serif face carries essays while a neutral sans organizes captions, notes, and recurring reference labels.

right.text: Full-bleed chapter openings alternate with smaller image constellations to keep the pace of reading varied.

blocks.title: Outcome
items: A consistent publication system for essays, notes, and image plates.
A print-ready archive that can continue as a recurring research series.
